error.sessionNotSet: Login session was not set. Please try again.
error.fetchUserFailed: Failed to fetch user info after login.

intro.title: Where is your knowledge right now?
intro.subtitle: No matter how much you chat and write notes, they fade away without a trace over time.
intro.painPoint1: Insights from ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini are buried somewhere down the scroll.
intro.painPoint2: Notion, Obsidian notes are buried in folders, left disconnected from each other.
intro.painPoint3: You know you recorded it somewhere, but you can't find it because there's no context.

solution.title: Turn conversations and notes into a living knowledge map
solution.subtitle: GraphNode AI reads, analyzes, identifies topics, and auto-connects them. No need to tag or link manually.

apiKey.title: Chat with AI
apiKey.description: Set up your API key to chat with AI. You can still use graph features without a key.
apiKey.linkText: Learn how to get an API key

dataImport.title: Import your data
dataImport.description: Drag and drop your existing notes (markdown files) or ChatGPT conversation exports.

visualize.title: Generate your graph
visualize.description: Now press 'Generate Graph' to create your knowledge map!

toast.apiKeyRequired: Please register your API key first.

aiAgentChatBox.title: HI!
aiAgentChatBox.subtitle: How can I help you today?
aiAgentChatBox.note: Make a note of this content
aiAgentChatBox.placeholder: Ask, search, or tell me anything
aiAgentChatBox.selectSourceFirst: Please select a source first (click @ to select a chat or note)

chat.selectChat: Please select a chat on the left or start a new chat.

image.onlyImageFiles: Only image files can be uploaded.

chatPreview.title: Chat Preview
chatPreview.hardcodedContent: This is sample conversation content. Actual data will be displayed here when loaded.

error.title: Failed to load graph
error.description: There was a problem loading the graph data. Please try again later.

empty.title: No graph generated yet
empty.description: Generate a graph to visualize connections between your chats and notes.
empty.generatingNotice: You will be notified when generation is complete. Please do not close the app.
empty.generatingHelp: Didn't receive the graph generation notification, or is it taking too long? Depending on the amount of data, it typically takes 10-30 minutes. For chat histories over 100MB, it may take more than 1 hour.

status.NOT_CREATED: Graph has not been created yet.
status.CREATING: Graph is currently being generated. Please wait.
status.CREATED: Graph has been created. Please refresh the page.
status.UPDATING: Graph is currently being updated. Please wait.
status.UPDATED: Graph has been updated. Please refresh the page.
status.error: An error occurred while checking graph status.

empty.notice: Graphs are generated based on your saved chats and notes. If you have no chats or notes, graph generation is not possible.

graphGeneration.requestedBody: Graph generation has started. Please wait.
graphGeneration.completedBody: Graph has been successfully generated. (Nodes: {{nodeCount}}, Edges: {{edgeCount}})

api.title: AI Provider API Key
api.subtitle: Manage your AI provider API key safely.

editor.title: Code Theme
editor.subTitle: Adjust the code theme of the interface for better visibility

theme.title: Theme
theme.subTitle: Adjust the app theme of the interface for better visibility.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.developerDescription: Developer Mode exposes menu items helpful for people writing apps using the
advanced.hardwareDescription: Uses your GPU to make GraphNode smoother. Turn this off if you are experiencing visual problems.
advanced.restartRequired: Restart the app to apply changes.

language.title: Select a Language
language.subtitle: Choose the language you want GraphNode to display.
language.saveFailed: Failed to save language setting. The setting will revert after restarting the app.

dropJsonZone.title: Drag & Drop JSON File Upload
dropJsonZone.maxSize: Only one file can be dropped (maximum 512MB recommended)

errorMessage.notJson: Only JSON files can be uploaded (.json)

errorMessage.notMd: Only Markdown files can be uploaded (.md)
errorMessage.exceptOther: Some files were excluded because they are not in MD format.

desktopNotification.title: Enable Desktop Notifications
desktopNotification.subtitle: Receive alerts on your desktop even when the app is not in focus

newMessage.title: New Message
newMessage.subtitle: Play a sound when a new message is received

appNotification.title: App Notification
appNotification.subtitle: Play a sound for app notifications

import.title: Import Data
import.subtitle: Import your data from external sources

trash.title: Trash
trash.subtitle: Deleted items are kept for 30 days

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.subtitle: Irreversible actions. Please proceed with caution.

clearNotes.title: Clear All Notes
clearNotes.description: Permanently delete all notes and folders

keybindsPanel.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
keybindsPanel.description: Click a shortcut to enter a new key combination. ⌘+A, ⌘+C, ⌘+V cannot be used.

tips.title: Shortcut Tips
tips.modifierKeys: Combine modifier keys (⌘, Ctrl, Shift, Alt) with regular keys
tips.windowsLinux: On Windows/Linux, Ctrl is used instead of ⌘

developerMode.title: Developer Mode
developerMode.subtitle: Enable advanced customization features for developers
developerMode.toggleDescription: Activate developer mode to customize the app with advanced features like custom MCP servers and graph colors.

graphColors.title: Graph Colors
graphColors.hint: Customize graph node and edge colors (Cmd/Ctrl + S to save)
graphColors.enableDevMode: Enable Developer Mode in My Account settings to customize graph colors.

mcp.title: MCP Servers
mcp.subtitle: Manage Model Context Protocol servers to extend AI capabilities
mcp.enableDevMode: Enable Developer Mode in My Account settings to add custom MCP servers.

filesystem.title: Filesystem Settings
filesystem.description: Add directories that the AI can access. Only files within these directories will be readable.
filesystem.securityWarning: Security: Only add directories you trust. The AI will be able to read files in these locations.

custom.name: Server Name
custom.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this server?
custom.warning: Warning: Custom MCP servers run with your system permissions. Only add servers from trusted sources.

notion.title: Notion Settings
notion.description: Enter your Notion API key to enable access to your Notion workspace.
notion.howToGetKey: To get your API key, create an internal integration in Notion and copy the Internal Integration Token.

google.title: {{service}} Settings
google.description: Connect your Google account to enable {{service}} access for the AI assistant.
google.clickToChange: Click to select a different file
google.dropOrClick: Drop JSON file here or click to select
google.credentialsPathHint: Download the credentials JSON file from Google Cloud Console
google.howToGetCredentials: Before authenticating, set up OAuth credentials:
google.step4: Create OAuth 2.0 Desktop credentials and download the JSON file
google.authRequired: Authentication required to use this service

vscode.title: VS Code Settings
vscode.description: VS Code MCP server allows AI to access your VS Code workspace and open files.

developerMode.title: Developer Mode
developerMode.description: Enable developer mode to add custom MCP servers

json.hint: Edit JSON to configure custom MCP servers (Cmd/Ctrl + S to save)

about.title: About MCP
about.description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) allows AI assistants to connect to external tools and data sources, extending their capabilities beyond built-in features.
